entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp. studied for hybrid performance

entities.name: CGMS
entities.description: Cytoplasmic Genetic Male Sterility system used for developing hybrids

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of parents to transmit favorable traits to their offspring

entities.name: LINE X TESTER MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding method used to estimate general and specific combining ability

entities.name: RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to test the performance of hybrids

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season during which the study was conducted

entities.name: GCA EFFECT
entities.description: General Combining Ability, the average effect of a parent in combination with other parents

entities.name: SCA EFFECT
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability, the deviation of a cross from the expected value based on GCA

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per individual plant, used as a performance metric

entities.name: ICPL 161
entities.description: A parent line showing desirable GCA for grain yield

entities.name: ICPL 149
entities.description: A parent line showing desirable GCA for grain yield

entities.name: ICPA 2039
entities.description: A parent line recommended for future hybridization

entities.name: ICPA 2156
entities.description: A parent line used in a promising hybrid cross

entities.name: ICPL 86022
entities.description: A parent line used in a promising hybrid cross

entities.name: ICPL 90048
entities.description: A parent line used in a promising hybrid cross

entities.name: ICPL 88039
entities.description: A parent line recommended for future hybridization

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMMES
entities.description: The systematic process of crossing plants to create improved hybrids

relationships.description: Hybrids of pigeonpea were based on the CGMS system
Combining ability was studied in pigeonpea
Combining ability was estimated using a line x tester mating design
GCA effect is a component of combining ability
SCA effect is a component of combining ability
GCA effect was estimated for grain yield per plant
SCA effect was estimated for grain yield
ICPL 161 exhibited a desirable GCA effect
ICPL 149 exhibited a desirable GCA effect
ICPA 2039 is recommended for future hybridization programmes
ICPL 88039 is recommended for future hybridization programmes
ICPL 161 is recommended for future hybridization programmes
ICPL 149 is recommended for future hybridization programmes
